features.name: 2D packed array of logic with dissimilar dimension types
features.description: Code should include a 2D packed array of logic where the two dimensions use different literal radix types (e.g., hexadecimal and non-hexadecimal)

features.name: struct typed packed array with multiple dimensions
features.description: Code should include a multi-dimensional packed array of a struct type defined in a package
features.snippet:
typedef struct packed { logic vld; logic [1:0] data; } struct_test_t;
struct_test_t [1:0][1:0] i_sign1;

features.name: parameterized struct packed array with scope resolution
features.description: Code should include a packed array of struct type using package scope resolution and parameter for dimension
